---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or new capability — open one before writing a PR
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Kungfu Kanban is single-user and local-first by design. Multi-user, hosted,
API-key providers, a database, and billing are out of scope — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
Opening this before a PR saves you building something that won't land.
-->

**The problem / motivation**

<!-- What's awkward or missing today? What are you trying to do? -->

**Proposed change**

<!-- Roughly what you have in mind. A sketch is fine — we can shape it here. -->

**In-scope check**

- [ ] This keeps the board single-user and local-first (no accounts, no hosting,
      no API-key providers, no database, no billing)
- [ ] It doesn't add a runtime dependency (or I've said why one is needed)

**Anything else**

<!-- Alternatives you considered, prior art, whether you'd want to send the PR. -->
